data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Security protocols are implemented to encrypt data in transit between users and Google servers.
data.technical_spec: Enforced HTTPS by default to safeguard data integrity and privacy.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Continuously monitors potential security threats using AI and machine learning.
data.technical_spec: Applies anomaly detection and user behavior analytics.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Infrastructure designed to withstand massive distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Google Cloud's global network for scalable DDoS protection.

data.title: User Authentication Security
data.description: Includes two-step verification and other security protocols to protect user accounts.

data.title: Data Privacy Compliance
data.description: Measures in place to comply with global data privacy standards, protecting user data.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to GDPR, CCPA, and other regional data protection laws.
